nasb.text: You shall do no work at all. It is to be a perpetual statute throughout your generations in all your dwelling places.

esv.text: You shall not do any work. It is a statute forever throughout your generations in all your dwelling places.

cnv.text: 甚麼工你們都不可作，這要在你們的一切住處作世世代代永遠的律例。

ccb.text: 你们不可做任何工作。不论住在哪里，你们都要世代遵守这永不改变的律例。
